description.value:
Your Twisted Chakra has the ability to harden and materialize solid material like Earth.

You gain the following benefits at all times, even without benefiting from any other Class Mod feature:

• You gain the Earth Release Affinity. Select 3 Jutsu with the Earth Release keyword that you qualify for. Add them to your known Jutsu list immediately as if innately taught by your Sealed Beast. (If you have any preexisting Nature Release affinities, you also qualify for Jutsu with both the Earth Release Nature Release and the pre-existing Nature Release keywords.)

You gain the following benefits while you are under the effects of Desperate Rage or Twisted Chakra Cloak:

• Ninjutsu you cast with the Earth Release keyword cannot be negated or countered.
• You can cast Ninjutsu with the Earth Release keyword of B-Rank or lower without Handsigns (HS) components.
• Jutsu you cast with the Earth Release keyword ignore Damage Reduction and Resistance, and treat Immunity as Resistance.
• Creatures who are vulnerable to Earth damage instead take four times as much damage from your Earth Release Jutsu.
